title: pityopsis graminifolia var. tenuifolia
intro: Pityopsis graminifolia var. tenuifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain goldenrod, is a flowering plant species native to North America, specifically in the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of Pityopsis graminifolia var. tenuifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Pityopsis graminifolia var. tenuifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
